document.masterDocTitle: Critical analysis of the type material of Mutillidae described from the Australasian Region (Hymenoptera)

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Critical analysis of the type material of Mutillidae described from the Australasian Region (Hymenoptera)

treatment.paragraph:
Ephutomorpha tyla Hearn et al ., 2019
; Australia
Ephutomorpha tyla Hearn, Williams & Parslow
in Hearn, Williams, Stevens, Schwarz, Davies & Parslow , 2019: 525; ♀ , ♂ .

Ephutomorpha uniformis André, 1904
; Australia (incl. Tasmania )
Ephutomorpha uniformis André, 1904: 445
; ♂ .

Ephutomorpha viridiaenea André, 1903
; Australia
Ephutomorpha viridiaenea André, 1903: 246
; ♀ .

Ephutomorpha virulenta Turner, 1914
; Australia
Ephutomorpha virulenta Turner, 1914: 440
; ♀ .

Ephutomorpha vittigera André, 1905
; Australia
Ephutomorpha vittigera André, 1905: 270
; ♀ .

Ephutomorpha volubilis Turner, 1914
; Australia
Ephutomorpha volubilis Turner, 1914: 445
; ♀ .

Eurymutilla Ashmead, 1899 Eurymutilla Ashmead, 1899: 56, 59; ♀ , ♂ . Type species:
Mutilla affinis Westwood, 1843
.

[
Mutilla morosa
]
var. albocalcarata André, 1898: 262
; ♂ ; syn. André 1904: 439.

Eurymutilla
curta (André, 1896)
; Indonesia ( Ambon , Buru, New Guinea , Seram, Taliabu)

Eurymutilla exigua flavicornis
(André, 1903); combination implied by Lelej 1983.

[
Ephutomorpha exigua
]
var. vagepunctata André, 1903: 278
; ♂ ; combination implied by Lelej 1983.

Eurymutilla exigua vagepunctata
(André, 1903); combination implied by Lelej 1983.

Odontomyrme Lelej, 1983
Odontomyrme Lelej, 1983: 613
; ♀ . Type species:
Odontomyrme tobiasi Lelej, 1983
.

Odontomyrme addenda ferrugineipes
(André, 1903); combination implied by Lelej 1983.

[
Ephutomorpha addenda
]
var. rufocincta André, 1903: 244
; ♀ ; combination implied by Lelej 1983.

Odontomyrme addenda rufocincta
(André, 1903); combination implied by Lelej 1983.

Odontomyrme rasnitsyni Lelej, 2021
; Papua New Guinea
Odontomyrme rasnitsyni Lelej, 2021: 3
; ♀ .

Odontomyrme tobiasi Lelej, 1983
; Australia
Odontomyrme tobiasi Lelej, 1983: 614
; ♀ .
Ponerotilla Brothers, 1994 Ponerotilla Brothers, 1994: 144; ♀ . Type species: Ponerotilla lissantyx Brothers, 1994.

Ponerotilla clarki
Brothers , 1994; Australia
Ponerotilla clarki
Brothers , 1994: 149; ♀
.

Ponerotilla incarinata
Brothers , 1994; Australia
Ponerotilla incarinata
Brothers , 1994: 145; ♀
.

Ponerotilla lamelligera
Brothers , 1994; Australia
Ponerotilla lamelligera
Brothers , 1994:150; ♀
.

Ponerotilla lissantyx
Brothers , 1994; Australia
Ponerotilla lissantyx
Brothers , 1994: 147; ♀
.

Orientilla Lelej, 1979
Orientilla Lelej, 1979: 1066
; ♀ . Type species:
Orientilla vietnamica
Lelej, 1979.

Bischoffitilla Lelej, 2002
Bischoffitilla Lelej, 2002: 126
; ♀ , ♂ . Type species: Squamulotilla exilipunctata Chen, 1957.

Bischoffitilla deserta (Smith, 1879)
; Indonesia ( Java , Kangean, Sulawesi ), Philippines (Luzon)

* Bischoffitilla multidentata
(André, 1896); Indonesia ( Sulawesi ); type locality = Indonesia ( Sumatera )
Bischoffitilla multidentata
(André, 1896); Sutanto et al. 2021

Andreimyrme Lelej, 1995
Andreimyrme Lelej, 1995: 5
; ♀ , ♂ . Type species:
Andreimyrme long
Lelej, 1995.

Andreimyrme silvorientalis Okayasu, 2021
; Indonesia ( Sulawesi )
Andreimyrme silvorientalis Okayasu
in Okayasu et al. , 2021: 20; ♀ .

Mickelomyrme Lelej, 1995
Mickelomyrme Lelej, 1995: 17
; ♂ , ♀ . Type species:
Mutilla hageni
Zavattari, 1913.

Mickelomyrme zebina (Smith, 1860)
; Brunei , Indonesia (Bacan, Kalimantan , Timor), Philippines , Malaysia

Smicromyrme Thomson, 1870
( sensu lato )
Smicromyrme Thomson, 1870: 208
; ♀ , ♂ . Type species:
Mutilla rufipes Fabricius, 1787
.

Smicromyrme electra Mickel, 1935
; Indonesia ( Sulawesi )
Smicromyrme electra Mickel, 1935: 280
; ♂ .

Tsunekimyrme Lelej, 1995
Tsunekimyrme Lelej, 1995: 16
; ♂ . Type species:
Mutilla fluctuata Smith, 1865
.

Odontomutilla Ashmead, 1899: 55
, 58; ♂ , ♀ . Type species:
Odontomutilla abbottii
Ashmead, 1899.

Odontomutilla australica André, 1903
; Australia
Odontomutilla australica André, 1903: 241
; ♂ , ♀ .

Odontomutilla ceramensis Mickel, 1935
; Indonesia (Pulau Seram)
Odontomutilla ceramensis Mickel, 1935: 206
; ♂ .

Odontomutilla inanis Mickel, 1935
; Papua New Guinea (incl. Daru , New Britain )
Odontomutilla inanis Mickel, 1935: 204
; ♀ , ♂ .

Odontomutilla manifesta (Smith, 1859)
; Indonesia (Kepualauan Aru, New Guinea )

Odontomutilla semifasciata
(André, 1896); Indonesia (Solor, Sulawesi , New Guinea )

Odontomutilla smithi Mickel, 1935
; Indonesia ( Sulawesi )
Odontomutilla smithi Mickel, 1935: 202
; ♀ .

Neotrogaspidia Lelej, 1996
Neotrogaspidia Lelej, 1996: 20
; ♂ , ♀ . Type species:
Mutilla pustulata
Smith, 1873.

Neotrogaspidia serafica (Zavattari, 1914)
; Indonesia ( Ambon , Lombok, Solor, Sumbawa)

Neotrogaspidia tricarinata (Zavattari, 1907)
; Indonesia (probably Aru or Kei) ( Australia incorrect)

Petersenidia Lelej
in Lelej & Yamane, 1992
Petersenidia Lelej
in Lelej & Yamane, 1992: 628; ♂ , ♀ . Type species:
Smicromyrme fukudai
Tsuneki, 1972.

Petersenidia mikhailovi Lelej, 2021
; Indonesia ( Sulawesi )
Petersenidia mikhailovi Lelej, 2021: 102
; ♀ .

Promecidia Lelej, 1996
Promecidia Lelej, 1996: 15
; ♀ , ♂ . Type species:
Promecidia yamanei
Lelej, 1996.

Protrogaspidia Lelej, 1996
Protrogaspidia Lelej, 1996: 18
; ♂ . Type species:
Mutilla volatilis Smith, 1859
.

Mutilla mariae Dalla Torre, 1897: 57
; syn. Mickel 1935: 266.

Trogaspidia Ashmead, 1899
( sensu lato )
Trogaspidia Ashmead, 1899: 58
; ♂ , ♀ . Type species:
Mutilla medon
Smith, 1855.

Trogaspidia albertisi (André, 1896)
; Indonesia (Kepalauan Aru, Misool, New Guinea , Run, Salawati, Seram, Waigeo), Papua New Guinea

Mutilla nigra Smith, 1859: 151
(not
Mutilla nigra Rossi, 1792
); ♂ ; syn. Krombein 1971: 48.

Trogaspidia anthylla (Smith, 1860)
; Indonesia ( Ambon , Bacan, Halmahera, Seram)

Trogaspidia cooki (André, 1895)
; Australia , Papua New Guinea

Mutilla cookii Dalla Torre, 1897: 27
; ♀ , ♂ ; unjustified emendation.

Curvitropidia pulawskii Pagliano, 2020
; ♂ ; Brothers,
new synonymy

Trogaspidia doricha (Smith, 1860)
; Indonesia ( Ambon , Bacan, New Guinea , Seram), Papua New Guinea

Timulla ( Trogaspidia ) wallacei lalokia Mickel
, 1935: 231; ♂ ; syn. Krombein 1971: 46.

Trogaspidia ianthea
ianthea (Smith, 1860)
; Indonesia (Bacan, Halmahera, Ternate )

Trogaspidia ianthea
rubiginosa (André, 1896)
; Indonesia ( Ambon , Seram)

Trogaspidia oceanica
oceanica (André, 1896)
; Indonesia (Biak, New Guinea , Yapen), Papua New Guinea (incl. Baronga, Lihir, New Britain , New Ireland , Umboi)

Trogaspidia oceanica
papuana (Krombein, 1971)
; Papua New Guinea (incl. Kiriwina, Normanby, Woodlark, Yule)

Trogaspidia oceanica
tulagiensis (Mickel, 1935)
; Papua New Guinea ( Bougainville , Buka ), Solomon Islands (widespread)

Trogaspidia orestes
orestes (Krombein, 1971)
; Papua New Guinea

Trogaspidia orestes trobriandensis
(Krombein, 1971); Papua New Guinea (Kiriwina, Normanby, Woodlark)

Trogaspidia yasumatsui maai
(Krombein, 1971); Papua New Guinea (New Hanover, New Ireland )

Trogaspidia yasumatsui
yasumatsui (Krombein, 1971)
; Papua New Guinea ( New Britain , Umboi)

Wallacidia Lelej & Brothers, 2008
Wallacidia Lelej & Brothers, 2008: 64
; ♀ , ♂ . Type species:
Mutilla oculata Fabricius, 1804
.

Wallacidia merops (Smith, 1860)
; Indonesia (Bacan, Gebe, Halmahera, Morotai, Ternate )

*
Wallacidia philippinensis (Smith, 1855)
; Indonesia (Ambon, Solor , Sulawesi ); type locality = Philippines
Wallacidia philippinense
[sic] (Smith, 1855); Lo Cascio (2015)
